Metadata.Description: Condensed Resource Availability Data context extracted from company policy, UK regulatory compliance, and personnel requirements documents

CompanyPolicy.documentation_requirements: Log all activities in CMMS including dates, personnel, and outcomes

daily: Visual checks for leaks, damage, abnormal noises
Verify pressure and temperature via sensors
weekly: Detailed pump and injector performance checks
monthly: Comprehensive system checks with sensor calibration
Test shut-off valves and inspect for corrosion

RegulatoryCompliance.additional_regulation: Provision and Use of Work Equipment Regulations 1998 (PUWER)
RegulatoryCompliance.marking_required: UKCA (UK Conformity Assessed) marking as of January 2025
requirements: Technical documentation and Declaration of Conformity
Guards, control systems, stability, noise control
RegulatoryCompliance.penalties: Fines, imprisonment, or product withdrawal for non-compliance

required_certifications: City & Guilds Level 3 in Mechanical Maintenance or manufacturer-specific
PersonnelRequirements.competency_assessments: Biannual assessments to verify technician skills
